category_sources: Official repository README says the crate assists in finding the Minimum Supported Rust Version.
source_facts.description says it finds the minimum supported Rust version for a project.
docs_sources: Official repository references foresterre.github.io/cargo-msrv as the project documentation site.
source_facts.homepage is the official cargo-msrv book/documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was not re-determined.
